title: Feature Request – Customizing Lookup Options in E&A

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, when composing emails in E&A, the lookup for recipients is limited to a single board. This restricts flexibility for teams that manage multiple contact boards or need to access domain-level contacts. It would be highly valuable to allow:

Pulling contacts from other Contact boards

Looking up contacts across all workspace boards

Integrating with company domain contacts

This enhancement would make E&A more scalable and practical for clients managing complex workflows.

What are you trying to achieve

I’d like more flexibility when composing emails in E&A so I can select recipients from multiple sources, not just one board. Many clients manage contacts across different boards or need to use their company-wide domain contacts. The goal is to make email communication within Monday more seamless and adaptable to real-world use cases.
